---
title: "Deployment should feel like the next step"
---

## Outcome

Participants understand the shape of moving from a local server to a hosted endpoint that Copilot Studio can connect to.

::: {.placeholder-figure}
![](../assets/placeholders/azure-deploy.svg)
:::

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A(Local project) --> B(Container image)
    B --> C(Container Apps)
    C --> D(Remote endpoint)
    D --> E(Copilot Studio)
```

:::: {.lesson-grid}
::: {.lesson-panel}
### Local first

If the server is unclear locally, hosting will not fix it.
:::

::: {.lesson-panel}
### Container second

Package the working server, not the half-working one.
:::

::: {.lesson-panel}
### Connection last

Only connect after the endpoint contract is understood.
:::
::::

::: {.callout-important}
## Keep the story linear

The room should understand why each deployment step exists before the Azure details show up.
:::
